meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Stop Slow Development
content.seo_description: Stop slow development speed with automated user onboarding. A beginner's guide to using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-quality client apps faster.
content.answer_block: Slow development speed is a silent revenue killer. By implementing automated user onboarding, you shift the burden of manual setup and education to intelligent systems. Using Antigravity and Claude Code, you can scaffold production-ready onboarding flows in minutes, allowing you to ship faster and impress clients with professional, high-converting interfaces.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking. You are staring at a blank IDE, the client deadline is looming, and your development speed has hit a wall. Every hour spent manually configuring user flows or explaining basic features is an hour stolen from your bottom line. The difference between a struggling freelancer and a high-earning consultant isn't just code; it's the ability to automate the friction that kills your momentum.

User onboarding is your secret weapon. When you treat onboarding as a product feature rather than an afterthought, you reduce support tickets and accelerate feature adoption. By leveraging Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you can transform your development lifecycle from a manual grind into a high-velocity delivery machine.

steps.title: Define the Onboarding Architecture
steps.description: Establish a modular state machine for your user journey. This ensures your onboarding logic remains decoupled from your core business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a robust, modular user onboarding state machine in React using TypeScript. Include interfaces for onboarding steps, progress tracking, and persistence.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create onboarding state machine structure in src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts'

steps.title: Implement Progress Persistence
steps.description: Users hate repeating steps. Use local storage or database syncing to ensure a seamless experience across browser sessions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a persistent storage utility for onboarding progress. It should handle local sync and provide a hook to resume from the last completed step.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate progress persistence utility using localStorage for onboarding flow'

steps.title: Build Context-Aware Tooltips
steps.description: Trigger contextual guidance only when necessary. Avoid overwhelming users with unnecessary modal windows.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a reusable Tooltip component that accepts a target element ID and displays context-aware onboarding hints using framer-motion.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create Tooltip component with framer-motion animations for context-aware guidance'

steps.title: Automate Data Collection Forms
steps.description: Streamline user input by breaking complex profiles into bite-sized, interactive steps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a multi-step form wizard component that validates input at each step and prevents navigation until requirements are met.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'build a multi-step wizard form with Zod validation for user onboarding'

steps.title: Final Integration and QA
steps.description: Connect the onboarding flow to the main application dashboard with a clean entry/exit transition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-level wrapper to conditionally render the onboarding flow based on the user's 'onboardingCompleted' flag in the database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement conditional onboarding wrapper for the main app dashboard'

pro_tips: Always use a 'skip' button; forced onboarding is the fastest way to drive users away.
Track the drop-off point in your onboarding funnel using analytics to identify confusing UI elements.
Keep your onboarding copy punchy and benefit-driven rather than feature-focused.
Use skeleton screens during the onboarding load to perceive faster interaction speed.
Store the user's onboarding state in a global context so it remains reactive across the entire application.
content.next_steps: Once the onboarding flow is live, implement A/B testing on your tooltips to see which guidance yields the highest user activation rate.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the code and start orchestrating it. By automating your onboarding, you reclaim your most valuable asset: time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
